title: lsp live-verification daemon
manager: A language-server check-daemon that verifies as you type — incremental, hash-keyed, budgeted — so verification squiggles appear in the editor like type errors, not as a separate batch step you remember to run later. This is what makes verification part of the writing loop instead of a gate: you see a property fail the moment you break it, while the reasoning is still fresh in your head.
cs: lsp check-daemon (incremental, hash-keyed, budgeted squiggles); live verification in the editor; makes checking part of the edit loop.
